name: pay
description: USDC payment infrastructure for AI agents on Base. Direct payments, metered tabs, and x402 HTTP paywalls.

skills.name: Direct Payment
skills.description: Send one-shot USDC payment to any address. Minimum $1.00. Fee: 1%.

skills.name: Tab Management
skills.description: Open, charge, close, and top-up pre-funded metered tabs for repeated API calls.

skills.name: Paid HTTP Request
skills.description: Make HTTP requests with automatic 402 payment handling via x402 protocol.

skills.name: Service Discovery
skills.description: Search for paid API services that accept USDC payments.

skills.name: Wallet Status
skills.description: Check USDC balance, open tabs, and locked funds.

skills.name: Fund and Withdraw
skills.description: Generate links to deposit or withdraw USDC from the agent wallet.
